meta.description: Construct competing endogenous RNA (ceRNA) networks integrating lncRNA–miRNA–mRNA interactions. Inputs: expression matrix, miRNA target databases. Outputs: network nodes/edges, co-expression correlation tables, network visualization.

key_strengths: Scope boundaries are precise and reduce accidental misuse on unsupported workflows such as differential expression or enrichment analysis.
The implementation is reproducible, with an exposed seed, hash-identical repeat runs, and session metadata saved as an artifact.
Error handling is specific and actionable, using stable SKILL_* messages across missing files, invalid parameters, collapsed networks, dependency issues, and timeouts.
The documented ceRNA construction logic matched live behavior across combined, single-database, and pairwise-overlap modes.

recommendations.title: Persist machine-readable run summary
recommendations.problem: Important provenance such as dataset mode, retained pair counts, runtime, and parameter values is printed to stdout but not written as a stable summary artifact. If users do not capture logs, later auditing is weaker than it should be.
recommendations.root_cause: Operational metadata is emitted as transient console logs instead of a durable output file.
recommendations.fix: Write a run_summary.json or run_summary.txt next to the CSV, PDF, and session info. Include input mode, dataset selection, strictness, thresholds, retained pair counts, runtime, and seed.

recommendations.title: Surface runtime expectations in SKILL.md
recommendations.problem: The main skill page is strong, but concrete runtime and resource expectations are documented mostly in cli-guide.md. Users who read only SKILL.md may underestimate the cost of broader source modes.
recommendations.root_cause: Performance guidance is concentrated in a secondary reference instead of the primary operating instructions.
recommendations.fix: Add a short runtime note near Usage or Testing in SKILL.md. Point users to timeout_seconds and mention that pairwise-overlap and broad starBase runs can take noticeably longer.

recommendations.title: Make overwrite behavior explicit
recommendations.problem: Rerunning the skill into an existing output directory will silently replace prior CSV and PDF artifacts. This does not break correctness, but it makes provenance management and accidental result loss easier than necessary.
recommendations.root_cause: Output directory creation is permissive and artifact writes do not guard against preexisting files.
recommendations.fix: Either fail when target artifacts already exist or add an explicit --overwrite flag and document the behavior clearly in SKILL.md and the CLI help.
